codeReview.summary: Implementation satisfies the feature intent and expected behavior. The commit applies subtle interaction tuning only (MAX_TILT 6, perspective 1200px in JS+CSS, lerp 0.05, shine opacity 0.08, spread 80%) while preserving mouse/touch/gyroscope handlers, iOS permission flow, mouseleave/touchend reset, GSAP entrance animation, cleanup with _rafId/deviceorientation removal, user-select/touch-callout protections, drag prevention, and hover shadow escalation.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Build validation in worker execution used a piped command (`pnpm build 2>&1 | tail -20`), which can mask non-zero build failures unless pipefail is enforced.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript skeleton for workerSessionId c9be352a-0b4f-4ff9-87cf-aad73c19854a includes Execute command: `cd /Users/pete/Code/clubstack-events/stop1 && pnpm build 2>&1 | tail -20`.

summary: Reviewed poster-interaction-redesign commit 70b036bd49dc8672673f1cf633a5f3d4c0b6f7d6 and found no blocking correctness or security issues. Assertions for subtle tilt tuning and preserved interaction behavior are met by code inspection and diff evidence.
